entity.label: Shiphrah
entity.subtitle: Female
entity.description: Beauty, one of the Egyptian midwives (Ex. 1:15).

nodes.label: Shiphrah
nodes.description: Beauty, one of the Egyptian midwives (Ex. 1:15).

verses.text: And the king of Egypt spake to the Hebrew midwives, of which the name of the one was Shiphrah, and the name of the other Puah:
